title: Proof Boundary — Agentic AI Requires Human Oversight Architecture
supported_claims: AI systems with consequential operational authority require explicit oversight roles and risk-management responsibilities.
Meaningful oversight includes monitoring, incident response, escalation, fallback, override, recovery, and deactivation criteria.
Observability and retained evidence are necessary for accountable review of AI-system behavior.
unsupported_claims: Any product-specific claim not revalidated against current documentation.
Any claim that a single oversight pattern is sufficient for every risk class.
Any claim that human oversight guarantees safety, reliability, or compliance.
